title: Korak 77

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
text = 'Hello Zaira'
custom_key = 'python'

def vigenere(message, key, direction):
    key_index = 0
    alphabet = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'
    final_message = ''

    for char in message.lower():
    
        # Append space to the message
        if char == ' ':
            final_message += char
        else:        
            # Find the right key character to encode/decode
            key_char = key[key_index % len(key)]
            key_index += 1

            # Define the offset and the encrypted/decrypted letter
            offset = alphabet.index(key_char)
            index = alphabet.find(char)
            new_index = (index + offset*direction) % len(alphabet)
            final_message += alphabet[new_index]
    
    return final_message
    
encryption = vigenere(text, custom_key, 1)
print(encryption)
decryption = vigenere(encryption, custom_key, -1)
print(decryption)
challengeFiles.seed:
text = 'Hello Zaira'
custom_key = 'python'

def vigenere(message, key, direction):
    key_index = 0
    alphabet = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'
    final_message = ''

    for char in message.lower():
    
        # Append space to the message
        if char == ' ':
            final_message += char
        else:        
            # Find the right key character to encode/decode
            key_char = key[key_index % len(key)]
            key_index += 1

            # Define the offset and the encrypted/decrypted letter
            offset = alphabet.index(key_char)
            index = alphabet.find(char)
            new_index = (index + offset*direction) % len(alphabet)
            final_message += alphabet[new_index]
    
    return final_message
    
encryption = vigenere(text, custom_key, 1)
print(encryption)
decryption = vigenere(encryption, custom_key, -1)
print(decryption)

tests.text: Parametar direction za vašu funkciju vigenere mora imati podrazumevanu vrednost 1.
tests.testString:
({ test: () => assert(runPython(`
    import inspect
    sig = str(inspect.signature(vigenere))
    sig == '(message, key, direction=1)'
  `))
})

description:
Funkciju se može pozvati sa podrazumevanim argumentima. Podrazumevani argument pokazuje vrednost koju funkcija treba da koristi ako mu nije prosleđen argument. Na primer, funkcija ispod prima tri argumenta, ali je možete pozvati prosleđujući samo dva argumenta. Treći će uzeti vrednost definisanu podrazumevano:

def foo(a, b, c=value):
    <code>

Promeni funkciju vigenere ili njen parametar direction u podrazumevanu vrednost 1.
